phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Islamic courtyard is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el patio islámico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿DON-deh es-TAH el PA-tyo ees-LAH-mee-ko?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del recorrido, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL reh-kohr-REE-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the tour, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the tour, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL reh-kohr-REE-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del recorrido, a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the throne room is located
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿me indica dónde está el Salón del Trono?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, meh een-DEE-kah DOHN-deh eh-STAH el sah-LOHN del TROH-noh?

likely_response.local: Suba al Patio de Santa Isabel, primera puerta.
likely_response.pronunciation: SOO-bah AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH SAHN-tah ee-sah-BEHL pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah
likely_response.translation_en: On the noble floor, follow the signs.

responses.english: On the noble floor, follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bah AHL pah-TEE-oh DEH SAHN-tah ee-sah-BEHL pree-MEH-rah poo-EHR-tah
responses.local: Suba al Patio de Santa Isabel, primera puerta.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the accessibility entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuál es la entrada para accesibilidad?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-as, KWAH-les lah en-TRAH-dah PAH-rah ak-seh-see-bee-lee-DAHD?

likely_response.local: Por la rampa de la Puerta del Trovador.
likely_response.pronunciation: POHR LAH RAHM-pah DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL troh-bah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: Use the side ramp, next to the ticket office.

responses.english: Use the side ramp, next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: POHR LAH RAHM-pah DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEHL troh-bah-DOHR
responses.local: Por la rampa de la Puerta del Trovador.

phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo comprar las entradas aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh PWEE-do kom-PRAR las en-TRA-das ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, situada a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah see-too-AH-dah AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, located at the entrance.

responses.english: At the ticket office, located at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah see-too-AH-dah AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.local: En la taquilla, situada a la entrada.
